2.25 INCHES OF RAIN FELL BETWEEN 430 PM AND 6 PM CAUSING WIDESPREAD STEET FLOODING. ONE WATER RESCUE OCCURRED. RALPH EDWARDS PARK AND GOLF COURSE FLOODED.
HEAVY RAINS WITH FLASH FLOOODING OCCURRING. WATER AND DEBRIS COVER PORTIONS OF HIGHWAY 187 MAKING ROAD IMPASSABLE. LAS PALOMAS CANYON ROAD ALSO FLOODED.
TWO LANDSPOUT TORNADOES WERE OBSERVED NORTH OF SIERRA BLANCA. BOTH LANDSPOUTS LASTED AN UNKNOWN AMOUNT OF TIME. NO INJURIES OR DAMAGE WERE ASSOCIATED WITH EITHER LANDSPOUT.
WEATHER SPOTTER REPORTED TORNADO AT 5:08 PM VIA ONLINE SUBMISSION.
